creator: dryice@dryice.name
text:
Attached is the shar file for ww/py-paste, the tools for using
	a WSGI stack in Python. It will be used in the (coming)
	TurboGears-devel port.

Fix: --- attached file begins here ---


--- attached file ends here -----Yy5ehjB7yWhunJqKBo3GHp0Df55lB3h9mauv7gzbA9wZr4nQ
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/www/py-paste
#	/usr/ports/www/py-paste/Makefile
#	/usr/ports/www/py-paste/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-plist
#
echo c - /usr/ports/www/py-paste
mkdir -p /usr/ports/www/py-paste > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-paste/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-paste/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	py-paste
X# Date created:		14 December 2006
X# Whom:			Dryice Liu	<dryice@dryice.name>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	Paste
XPORTVERSION=	1.0
XCATEGORIES=	www python
XMASTER_SITES=	http://cheeseshop.python.org/packages/source/P/Paste/ \
X		http://dryice.name/computer/FreeBSD/distfiles/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
X
XMAINTAINER=	dryice@dryice.name
XCOMMENT=	Tools for using a Web Server Gateway Interface stack
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	easy_install:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XUSE_PYTHON=	2.3+
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
XPASTEVER?=	${PORTVERSION}
XPYTHONVER?=	${_PYTHON_VERSION}
XPLIST_SUB=	PASTEVER=${PASTEVER} \
X		PYTHONVER=${PYTHONVER}
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/Makefile
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-paste/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-paste/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/distinfo'
XMD5 (Paste-1.0.tar.gz) = d000bba7779d8540e3a1d18bce452cc9
XSHA256 (Paste-1.0.tar.gz) = 520235d9760cb4e09dba9212bd1d87b88519f9d1e21a18bcd527b0179d4e14b1
XSIZE (Paste-1.0.tar.gz) = 322811
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-descr'
XPython Paste brings consistency to Python web development and web
Xapplication installation, providing tools for both developers and
Xsystem administrators.
X
XThese provide several pieces of "middleware" (or filters) that can be
Xnested to build web applications. Each piece of middleware uses the
XWSGI (PEP 333) interface, and should be compatible with other
Xmiddleware based on those interfaces.
X
XAuthor:	Ian Bicking <ianb at colorstudy com>
XWWW:	http://pythonpaste.org
END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/www/py-paste/pkg-plist'
